title: Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited:
Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yum! Brands India Advisory Limited!
